package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesNewbufferstringOnStringConversion() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_newbufferstring_on_string_conversion"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.NewBufferString(string(b))` instead of using the byte slice directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
